code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut total = 0
mut stop = false
for tok in tokens
  if not stop
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if n < 0
        stop = true
      else
        total = total + n
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

println("partial=#{total}")
